    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class PokemonGame
     
    mainLayout - Variable in class view.MainMenuView
     
    mainLayout - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    mainMenu - Variable in class view.MainMenuView
     
    mainMenu - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    mainMenuScene - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    MainMenuView - Class in view
     
    MainMenuView() - Constructor for class view.MainMenuView
     
    makeChallenges() - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
     
    makeComputerMove() - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Attempts to make a valid move for CombatController.p2.
    makeMainMenu() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    Creates the MainMenu scene
    makeMainMenu(Stage) - Method in class view.MainMenuView
     
    makeMove(int, int) - Method in class controller.CombatController
    Causes a player's active Mon to use the move given as a param and apply the relevant effect associated with it (typically damaging the other Mon).
    makePlayers(Mon[][]) - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
     
    makePreview() - Method in class view.PokemonView
     
    makeTeams() - Method in class model.ChallengesHolder
     
    maxHp - Variable in class model.Mon
     
    maxPP - Variable in class model.Move
     
    medium - Enum constant in enum class controller.CombatController.Difficulty
     
    model - package model
     
    Mon - Class in model
    Abstract class that all mons should inherit from.
    Mon() - Constructor for class model.Mon
     
    mons - Variable in class model.Player
    The Player's full team.
    monSelect - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    Move - Class in model
    Abstract class that all Mon moves should inherit from.
    Move(String, Move.Type, int, int) - Constructor for class model.Move
     
    Move.Type - Enum Class in model
    Enum to support type advantage calculations later in development.
    movePane - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    moves - Variable in class model.Mon
     
    moves - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    moveStack - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    myImageView - Variable in class view.MainMenuView
